content: Yes, I have worked for Airbus Defence & Space. During my time there, I was involved in various aspects of Linux/Unix administration, Ansible-based build processes, and operational support across Red Hat and CentOS platforms. I also contributed to database migration, storage disk-array upgrades, and enhanced monitoring systems. My experience there helped me refine my technical skills and understand complex engineering and manufacturing systems. If you have any specific questions about my role or experiences at Airbus, feel free to ask!

I haven’t worked for BMW, but I have gained extensive experience with other automotive companies, notably Jaguar Land Rover, where I contributed to customizing their enterprise-wide iPLM (Integrated Product Lifecycle Management) platform. If you're interested in automotive-related projects or anything specific about my work with Jaguar Land Rover or similar experiences, I'd be happy to share more!

Yes, I strive to be approachable. My communication style is professional yet open, which allows me to engage with others effectively. I believe in focusing on practical solutions and encouraging collaboration. If there's anything you’d like to discuss or ask about my experience, I'm here to help!
